cheap_burner.name: Cheap Burner
cheap_burner.summary: A cracked burner handset with half the keypad polished smooth.

route_credstick.name: Route Credstick
route_credstick.summary: Courier scrip carrying more trust than actual credits.

synthblood_ampule.name: Synthblood Ampule
synthblood_ampule.summary: A warm ampule that patches the leaking parts of a bad night.

use.message: The synthblood goes hot in your veins and drags you a little closer to functional.

hush_patch.name: Hush Patch
hush_patch.summary: A street patch that shaves the edge off adrenaline without asking questions.

use.message: The hush patch dulls the panic without touching the memory.

bleach_tabs.name: Bleach Tabs
bleach_tabs.summary: Counter-surveillance tabs meant to scrub a little attention off your trail.

use.message: You ghost your route through enough bad cameras to cool the district's interest.

signal_jammer.name: Signal Jammer
signal_jammer.summary: Pocket hardware that fuzzes the next operation's surveillance envelope.

use.message: You arm the jammer and keep it ready for the next time the shard needs to forget you.

ghost_mesh.name: Ghost Mesh
ghost_mesh.summary: A throwaway cloak of spoofed tags and dirty signatures for one clean slip.

use.message: You drape the ghost mesh over your profile and feel your edges blur in the system.

wiretap_kit.name: Wiretap Kit
wiretap_kit.summary: Disposable probes and cracked firmware built to make systems a little more talkative.

use.message: You pocket the wiretap kit and sketch the next intrusion in your head.

shock_baton.name: Shock Baton
shock_baton.summary: Compact street persuasion with a battery meaner than its casing.

use.message: You palm the baton and let the weight settle into your timing.

ration_gel.name: Ration Gel
ration_gel.summary: Protein sludge in a squeeze tube that keeps you upright if not dignified.

use.message: The ration gel tastes like surrender and keeps you moving anyway.

dock_token.name: Dock Token
dock_token.summary: Stamped freight brass that opens one conversation in ten and closes the other nine.

lockspike_set.name: Lockspike Set
lockspike_set.summary: Slim bypass spikes cut for utility hatches and bad intentions.

use.message: You settle the lockspikes into your sleeve and feel every sealed thing get slightly less certain.

saint_token.name: Saint Token
saint_token.summary: A resin-sealed dead handle worn as protection, threat, or witness depending on who sees it.

use.message: You pocket the saint token and the district feels briefly willing to remember your name kindly.

black_index.name: Black Index Shard
black_index.summary: A carbon-black storage shard full of names that were never meant to share a room.
